question: I went to Virtue restaurant & bar in Chicago for my birthday on March 22, 2021 and the main course I had was delicious!  Unfortunately, when I went back about a month later on April 21, it was no longer on the dinner menu.  Using the Wayback Machine, can you help me figure out which main course was on the dinner menu for Virtue on March 22, 2021 but not April 21, 2021? Answer using the singular form, without articles.
raw_answer: shrimp marsh hen mill buttered grit

research_queries: Virtue restaurant bar Chicago website URL
Virtue Chicago restaurant menu March 2021 Wayback Machine
Virtue Chicago restaurant menu April 2021 Wayback Machine
working_plan: Find the official website URL for Virtue restaurant & bar in Chicago
Use Wayback Machine to access the website's dinner menu as it appeared on or around March 22, 2021
Use Wayback Machine to access the website's dinner menu as it appeared on or around April 21, 2021
Compare the two menus to identify main courses present in March but not in April
Format the answer in singular form without articles
planner.answer_shape: short phrase describing a main course dish

solver.answer: shrimp marsh hen mill buttered grit
solver.reasoning_summary: Using Wayback Machine snapshots, I compared Virtue restaurant's dinner menu from March 22, 2021 and April 21, 2021. The March 22 menu listed 'Shrimp marsh hen mill buttered grits' ($22) under Large Rations, but by April 21, this dish was no longer available and had been replaced by 'Walleye crawfish & shrimp étouffée, buttered grits' ($25). Converting the full dish name to singular form without articles gives 'shrimp marsh hen mill buttered grit'.

issues: Capitalization error: The original menu item 'Shrimp marsh hen mill buttered grits' has capital 'S' in 'Shrimp'. The transformation should preserve this capitalization, resulting in 'Shrimp marsh hen mill buttered grit' rather than 'shrimp marsh hen mill buttered grit'.
judge.revised_answer: Shrimp marsh hen mill buttered grit

Annotator Metadata.Steps:
1. Search the web for "Virtue restaurant & bar Chicago"
2. Find the restaurant's website, https://www.virtuerestaurant.com
3. Find the page for the dinner menu, https://www.virtuerestaurant.com/menus/
4. Paste the URL of this page into the Wayback Machine at web.archive.org
5. Open the versions of the page archived on March 22, 2021 and April 21, 2021
6. Ensure that both pages are open to the "dinner menu" tab
7. Find the "large ration" that was present on the March 22 version of the menu but not April 21: shrimp
Annotator Metadata.Tools:
1. Web browser
2. Search engine
3. Access to the Internet Archive, web.archive.org
4. Text processing/diff tool
